AJAMAGHOULIGAN-HAUNTED.title: Haunted
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-HAUNTED.description: At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold], play it.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BURY.title: Bury
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BURY.description: Put this card into your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BURIED.title: Buried
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BURIED.description: This card can be [gold]Exhumed[/gold] back into your hand.
